title: calanthe australis
intro: Calanthe australis, also known as the autumn calanthe, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infection. The health benefits of Calanthe australis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
